The '''''Retaliator''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] which was present at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="XWA">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Retaliator'' was assigned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Venaari]].<ref name="OOAK">{{JournalCite|5|One of a Kind (short story)}}</ref> It remained in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service until at least [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], when it participated in the [[Battle of Adumar]] after the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] chose to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="SoA">''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
